ocr_findings.description: The 5G roadmap table is complex (6 columns, multiple merged cells, nested annotations). OCR collapses the LPWA row (lines 33-39): 'LPWA PoC / LPWAサービス提供 / 一部LPWA全国展開' are merged into a single cell spanning all columns instead of being distributed across time-period columns. The ★Sigfox and ★LPWA annotation rows are also misaligned. The table structure is partially recovered but column mapping is unreliable.
OCR line 39 reads '★YC-ELTRES' — image shows '★ソニー・ELTRES'. The 'ソニー' brand name is dropped and replaced with 'YC', a wrong-character substitution.
OCR captures the image reference tags (img-0.jpeg, img-1.jpeg) as placeholder text for the 試験にはコレが出る！ mascot illustrations — acceptable since illustrations have no text content.

reviewer_notes: Page covers the ロードマップ section with the complex 5G technology roadmap table. The introductory bullet list and surrounding body text are well-captured. The main defect is the multi-column roadmap table: LPWA rows have column-merging errors and '★ソニー・ELTRES' is misread as '★YC-ELTRES'. The table is complex enough that partial structural loss is expected, but meaning of the overall roadmap concept is preserved.
